title: Lab 48: SSH Key Authentication And SCP
description: Configure key-based SSH access and securely copy a file to the second system

tasks: Create user copy48 on both clientvm and servervm. Set the password on both systems to redhat.
As user copy48 on clientvm, generate an ED25519 SSH key pair with no passphrase.
Configure passwordless SSH access for copy48 from clientvm to servervm using the public key.
Using scp over SSH, copy /home/copy48/payload.txt from clientvm to /home/copy48/inbox/ on servervm.
hints: Use ssh-keygen, ssh-copy-id, and scp as the target user.
